response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software engineering experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with a strong recent track record in the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and current role at re:cinq. The current role explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which directly matches the rare 'AI agent development' requirement. Engineering-craft signals are strong (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, public talks, OSS projects). Some specific items (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, PostgreSQL) are not explicitly mentioned, but the breadth of stack and demonstrated language-agnostic approach make ramp-up low risk.
strengths: Direct, recent production experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent / MCP infrastructure work in current role — directly matches a hard-to-fill requirement
Deep engineering-craft background: TDD, CI/CD, OSS maintainership, conference talks, and workshop authoring
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Kotlin is absent (Java present but dated); PostgreSQL not explicitly listed
Cloud/containerization signal is light — AWS CDK and Kubernetes appear only briefly
